summary: Workflow lacks critical error handling and shell hardening: no set -euo pipefail in steps, no post-step verification that reports exist before assertions run. Fixture files (fixtures/secrets.json, cases/*/secrets.json) are missing—deliverable cannot run. Assertion files duplicate checks; should share a validation helper. Action versions pinned to major only (v4, v2)—better to pin patch (v4.1.0). Scripts are well-typed with sound domain logic, but test harness is brittle, depends on internal act behavior, and unintegrated from workflow. No artifact upload to preserve results. Good least-privilege YAML structure, deterministic via VALIDATOR_NOW, but overall not production-ready.
